16994.description: Hara Morshore was first described as short, lean, auburn hair, green eyes, with alert bearing.

16995.description: Adan Morshore was first described as compact, slender, black hair, blue eyes, with alert bearing.

16996.description: Ewan Fenovar was first described as average height, heavyset, black hair, gray eyes, with bold bearing.

16997.description: Cira Everwatch was first described as short, broad shouldered, auburn hair, gray eyes, with restless bearing.

16998.description: Cade Lordun the 2nd was first described as tall, heavyset, black hair, blue eyes, with somber bearing.

16999.description: Fiora Fenovar was first described as short, heavyset, silver streaked hair, blue eyes, with bold bearing.
